---
title: "Ordinary Differential Equations: Theory, Analysis, and Computation"
subtitle: "Core Mathematics — Year 1"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Ordinary Differential Equations: Theory, Analysis, and Computation

**Track**: Core Mathematics — Year 1

ODEs are the language of dynamics. This course covers existence theory, qualitative analysis, stability, and numerical methods — preparing the student for every dynamical model in the curriculum.

## Table of Contents

1. Existence and Uniqueness
2. Linear Systems
3. Phase Plane Analysis and Qualitative Theory
4. Stability Theory
5. Bifurcation Theory
6. Perturbation Methods
7. Delay Differential Equations
8. Numerical Methods for ODE Systems

---

## Chapter 1: Existence and Uniqueness

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Linear Systems

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Phase Plane Analysis and Qualitative Theory

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Stability Theory

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Bifurcation Theory

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Perturbation Methods

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Delay Differential Equations

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Numerical Methods for ODE Systems

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
